series_metadata.series_description: File contains correspondence with outside counsel regarding Lottery and or vendor Trademarks, including, but not limited to, clearance search materials to certify good faith in adoption of mark, application and registration, trademark certificates, specimens, attorney work product, documents retained to prove ownership of trademark and priority of use, and other related documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital records for 5 years after the discontinued use of the Trademark, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. If not transferred, review for administrative value, then destroy. ; Electronic: If it is decided to not use a Trademark, retain digital copy for 3 years and 1 day after it expires, then destroy, Electronic: Delete ; Electronic: Delete
